name: loxberry-maveo-connect
description: LoxBerry 3 plugin: Maveo Connect garage (Node daemon + PHP UI)

scripts.build:client: npm ci --prefix maveo-connect-stick-client && npm run build --prefix maveo-connect-stick-client
scripts.build:daemon: npm ci --prefix daemon && npm run build --prefix daemon
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:daemon
